output_summary: Loaded schemas for harness + web + task tools so the implementation loop can run.
Found 1 existing session (auto_eda) under D:/N Projects/Harness-Benchmark-Skill/examples — confirmed format to mirror.

Extracted TrimKV method: retention gate g(x) → beta, exp decay beta^(t-i), argmin eviction when cache > M, retention-weighted attention (logits + (t-i)*log beta), capacity loss max(0, sum_i beta_i^(t-i) - M)/t, gate MLP 512 units, bias init 18.0, lambda_cap=1.0.

Repo layout: src/trimkv, train/llm/scripts, examples/test_qwen3.py, examples/visualize.ipynb. Core files: trimkv/cache_utils.py (TrimKVCache), trimkv/models/qwen3.py (attention patch). Supported models: Qwen3-*, Phi-3-mini, DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B. Python 3.11+, Torch 2.7+, transformers 4.57.1, FA 2.7.2+.
Existing subdirs: Harness-Benchmark-Skill, XSA, auto_eda, kernel, portfolio, tl-draw-mcp. No KV-Cache folder yet.

Inspected existing harness session to mirror schema: session_meta.json (harness_version/model/project/date/task_prompt), tool_calls.json (list of {step, tool, input, output_summary, timestamp}), trace.md (STEP blocks), diff_summary.md (STEP/FILES CHANGED/LINES ADDED/REMOVED/REASON).

input: 8 tasks: skeleton, retention_gate, cache_utils, attention, losses, qwen3 patch, train+examples+README, harness logs
output_summary: Created task list with 8 entries covering end-to-end delivery.
Project skeleton and harness trimkv_impl session folder created.
Packaging scaffolding: deps (torch>=2.3, transformers>=4.45, accelerate, einops), installable package `trimkv`.
RetentionGate: Linear(d,512) -> GELU -> Linear(512, H_kv), last-layer weights zero-init and bias 18.0 (sigmoid ≈ 1 at init). Produces (B,T,H_kv) beta.

TrimKVCache stores keys, values, log_beta, creation_step per layer. current_log_scores(t) returns (t - i) * log_beta. _enforce_budget aggregates per-head log scores with amin, keeps top-M via gather — evicts the rest. Supports buffer_size to amortise.
retention_weighted_attention: logits = q·kᵀ / sqrt(d) + log_scores (broadcast over T_q); GQA via repeat_interleave; softmax in fp32.

distillation_loss = KL(student||teacher) * T^2 + ce_weight*CE. capacity_loss builds upper-triangular age matrix, computes beta_i^(t-i) via exp(log_beta * age), sums over i, clips (sum - M)+, divides by (t+1), averages over layers+heads.

TrimKVQwen3ForCausalLM wraps HF Qwen3, installs RetentionGate on each self_attn, monkey-patches forward to (1) compute q/k/v + optional q_norm/k_norm + RoPE, (2) gate(hidden) -> beta, (3) cache.update -> keys/values/log_beta, (4) retention_weighted_attention. generate() uses TrimKVCache across decode steps.

Gate-only distillation trainer: frozen teacher + frozen student base, only student.gate_parameters() trainable. Collects betas from per-layer hidden states, computes KL + CE + lambda_cap*capacity_loss, AdamW, grad-clip 1.0, checkpoint under checkpoints/gates_M{M}/gates.pt.
CLI smoke test: load_trimkv_qwen3 + optional --gate-ckpt, runs model.generate and prints decoded output.
Full README: overview, repo layout, install, quick inference, gate training, porting to other LMs, paper→code map, harness logging, limitations.
Wrote harness session trimkv_impl mirroring auto_eda schema so mcp__harness__refresh + list_sessions surfaces this run.
